tech-demo.rationale: Male mid-pitch → perceived competence (Nass 1997, Dou 2022). 150 WPM: balanced for technical content.

explainer.rationale: Female → perceived trustworthiness in explainer video (CXL/Labay n=202). 140 WPM: standard explainer pace, allows complex content absorption.

promo.rationale: Female enthusiastic → warmth + engagement (Reinares-Lara 2016). 160 WPM: upper comfortable range for energy (Rodero 2016).

tutorial.rationale: Male calm → authority without intimidation (Nass 1997). 130 WPM: slower pace for step-by-step comprehension.

sales.rationale: Male controlled pitch → sales performance (Du et al. 2022, IEEE). 150 WPM: balanced for persuasive content.

onboarding.rationale: Female calm → empathy, anxiety reduction (convergence healthcare studies). 130 WPM: slow for comfort.

speechRateGuidelines.source: Rodero 2016, Media Psychology; Murphy & Castel 2022, Applied Cognitive Psychology

max-comprehension.use: 2x speed ceiling — retention degrades beyond (Murphy & Castel 2022)
